creator: ykasap@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 197002
patch for synergy-1.10.1

Please provide a synergy v1 port separated from the current v2 port.
Currently sysutils/synergy is version 2, but v2 is not compatible with v1.
Synergy v2 is now considered beta (again) and using v1 is recommended by symless.
Also, synergy-core-v2 doesn't contain auto-configuration support,
so I cannot use my FreeBSD server with Windows/Mac v2 clients.

I made a patch against the current sysutils/synergy directory.
I disabled building legacy GUI because I couldn't solve Qt5 detection issues.
Also I disabled building legacy installer.
